chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr.B.A. No.D-60 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on urgent application M.A. No.9124/2022 2. For orders on office objection. 3. For orders on exemption application M.A. No.9125/2022 4. For hearing of main case 17.10.2022 Mr. Ayaz Ali Gopang advocate for applicant along with applicant -.-.-. 1. Urgency granted. 2. Overruled. 3. Granted. 4. By means of this application, applicant Chanesar son of Ghulam Ali Khoso seeks protective bail in Crime No.181/2022, u/s 302, 324, 430, 147, 148, 149, 337-H(ii), 353 PPC r/w Section 6/7 ATA, registered at PS Kazi Ahmed. It is inter alia contended by learned counsel for applicant that applicant is innocent and has falsely been implicated in a case with malafide intention; that the applicant intends to surrender before the trial court for the purpose of relief as contemplated under section 498 CrPC but he apprehends his arrest at the hands of police. Without touching the merits and de-merits of the case, applicant is granted protective bail for a period of 07 days commencing from today, subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.30,000/- (rupees thirty thousand) and P.R Bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. In case the applicant/accused failed to appear before the concerned court within the stipulated period the surety amount shall be forfeited. This order shall cease to have effect after expiry of 07 days or when the applicant surrenders before the concerned court, whichever is earlier. In view of the above, this bail application stands disposed of.

This order shall cease to have effect after expiry of 07 days or when the applicant surrenders before the concerned court, whichever is earlier. In view of the above, this bail application stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
